text: Being here, I feel a certain strangeness—caught in liminal spaces marked by glass and reflection, fire safety and evacuation routes, boundaries and precautions. Entering the next space, the wall's vibrant display and glowing text draw my thoughts inward. I am aware of my confusion, my awareness itself observed; perception is easily clouded. The words speak to me: How little it takes to lose focus, how even here, surrounded by research and innovation, clarity can slip away. I am humbled, and a bit awed, by the fragility of my own understanding.
